title: Building For The World From India ft. Vargab Bakshi, Meeting Sundar and more...
description:
Calling all developers! Don't miss the upcoming Wix Studio Developers Conference on June 29th in Bangalore. Apply to attend at https://www.devstudiocon.com/?type=op and learn from industry experts about the latest trends in web development, AI, and more.

In this episode, we are joined by special guest Vargab Bakshi, Head of Wix India, to discuss the growing trend of Indian developers building for global clients using platforms like Wix Studio. 

Tanmay and Varun also dissect the recent drama surrounding OpenAI and Scarlet Johansson's voice, and talk about behind the scenes of meeting Sundar Pichai.

title: Sam Altman In India, Apple Vision Pro, Problem With Text-to-video and more | Overpowered Episode 5
description:
Check out https://www.aevytv.com/

In this episode we explore Apple's latest innovation, the Apple Vision Pro. We'll discuss the challenges with VR, compare Apple Vision Pro and Meta Quest, and highlight the exciting features that set Apple Vision Pro apart. We also touch on influential figures like Mark Zuckerberg and the rise of Nvidia. On top of that we cover AI topics like Text-to-Video, its problems, and its limitations. Get an inside look at demos of Runway Gen 2, logo making for overpowered, product shots using Midjourney, and 3D avatar generation.

title: Phone Calling AI Tanmay Bhat, Building React Apps Using Claude & more!
description:
Today we discuss Character AI, Kling, Claude, and the implications of powerful AI tools like these.

Plus, we also explore how our editing process has been supercharged by Intel's groundbreaking AI technology. The latest Intel® Core™ Ultra processors, powering cutting-edge AI PCs, have enabled us to use advanced tools like Adobe Premiere Pro's AI plugin, AutoPod, with unprecedented efficiency.

These AI PCs, featuring Intel® Core™ Ultra processors, have drastically cut our editing time from days to just hours! The transformative AI capabilities of Intel's processors are revolutionizing content creation across the board.

Want to know more about these game-changing processors? Check out the link in the description to learn how Intel's AI boost is transforming content creation: https://shorturl.at/ecEUr

05:04 - Discussion on Character AI and digital clones
